# Sweet Reservation

> Logiciel SaaS de gestion pour hostels et auberges au Maroc.
> Hostel management SaaS for Morocco and North Africa.

Sweet Reservation is a French-language property management system (PMS) built specifically for Moroccan hostels and auberges. It replaces paper registers, Excel sheets, and WhatsApp notes with a single digital platform.

## What it does

- **Check-in digital** — Complete guest check-in in under 60 seconds, including bed assignment and payment recording
- **Fiche de police** — Automatic generation of the Moroccan police registration form (fiche de police) as a PDF, compliant with prefecture requirements
- **Live bed map** — Real-time visual grid of every bed's status (available, occupied, dirty, maintenance)
- **WhatsApp integration** — Send welcome messages, payment reminders, and checkout notifications via WhatsApp (wa.me deep links + Meta Cloud API)
- **Payments in MAD** — Record cash, bank transfer (virement), and CMI card payments in Moroccan Dirhams
- **Night audit** — Guided end-of-day cash reconciliation and police report generation
- **Revenue reports** — RevPAR, occupancy rate, channel profitability (Booking.com, Hostelworld, direct)
- **Staff management** — Owner + manager + receptionist + housekeeping roles with invite flow
- **Multi-language** — French (primary), Arabic, English

## Who it's for

Hostel and auberge owners in Morocco (Agadir, Marrakech, Casablanca, Fes, Tangier, Chefchaouen). Also relevant for riads and small guesthouses that need police form compliance.

## Pricing

- Free 14-day trial, no credit card required
- Starter plan: $19/month (up to 20 beds)
- Pro plan: $49/month (unlimited beds, advanced reports, staff management)
- Bank wire payment in MAD available for Moroccan customers

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://www.sweetreservation.com
- Sign up: https://www.sweetreservation.com/register
- Login: https://www.sweetreservation.com/login

## Company

Sweet Reservation (Stayy Sarl), Morocco.
Contact: https://www.sweetreservation.com
